Its a decent game but my problem is, there's no cool heat vision+flight saught of thing and you cant destroy buildings. Itd be pretty cool if you could add these
This game is old and not getting update but is cool

before getting this game, i quickly checked out the demo. i was instantly amazed. i felt like this was the best superhero vr game i’ve played, all of the powers were really cool AND well made, they felt so satisfying and easy to control from the beginning, you could even customize them! the first robot attack was amazing! the voice acting, the enemies, and everything felt so immersive. after the demo was done, i instantly bought the game.

when i got back in the game, the second robot ambush was… exactly the same, same thing, same enemies, same end boss. i checked out the 3 other bosses wich i do have to admit are pretty awesome. but after that, there’s nothing left. the base game is awesome and polished, but there’s not much to do after messing around with the 12 powers.

i really want to love this game, but it needs more than just this. but now that the devs are busy on elements divided, i don’t think there’s anything more coming.
I love this game though
So number one its fun it has powers and stuff but no missions most powers are just boring i want new powers look at blade and sorcery for insperation but other wise ok game

It was fun finding out how to use the ability’s and other things, especially getting unlock more powers. But overtime I got bored, mainly because there’s only a few quest for you to do and all you do is fly through circles. You constantly get chased by robots and there’s no rag-doll humans or monsters. I really wish I spent an extra 5$ on demigod vr because they’re both the same but superfly has no actual enemy’s and only robots that you can’t even grab or throw.

developer_response.body: Hi Soysox, actually Superfly released *before* Project Demigod. Regardless, we have immense respect for the developer of Project Demigod, we feel both games are good but scratch different itches.

I'd love to see a night mode and a flying mode similar to that of a certain flagship DC superhero I won't name or even an Amazon animated hero who seems to be indestructible (or another word like it) the detail on the map is great im a fan of the style. I'd lean more (personally) into a comic book style but that could be just me (maybe a reskin setting to make it seem more like it) my only other desire is a series of different enemies, the robots and robot dragons can quickly get tiresome and as great as they are. I'd love to see more human, beasts, other supers etc that could really boost the games profile. Sorry for such a long review!

Played for a couple hours. Not really diverse enough for my own taste, but I can be kind of a snob about that stuff. The enemy variety wasn't really enough for me, and the powers are all a little too simple. Though the psychic power's alternative attack is friggin awesome. Probably fun enough to occupy people who don't need too much going on to have fun, but just a little too repetitive for myself. Still a good game. Encountered no bugs or glitches in my playtime.

reviews.review_title: Really good but could use work
reviews.review_description: I love this game, but there are a lot of things that I feel like are needed first running on walls with super speed second being able to punch without using your power and third they need to add better powers like a symbiote or slowing down time specifically slowing down time because then I can actually see what I'm doing for a second.

I'm so glad this game exists, because there is currently none other like it on a standalone VR system. I had an ultra-realistic superman dream this morning, and I wanted to reproduce it as much as possible with my Meta Quest 3. Superfly got so close, minus the feelings of wind, moisture and g-force. You have to try the iron man mode on 1000x  (menu-extra->power multipler)! It's the absolute best for simulating the feeling of superman or iron man flying on a standalone VR system. I wish I could run this through my laptop with a 13980HX and RTX 4090 mobile to the Meta Quest 3 for better performance and overall experience of immersion.

I don't know how this has such a high rating, it's one of the most ugly looking games, even by the standalone mode standarts. Maybe it could impress someone who never ever saw a videogame in their life. For me it's a hard pass.
Please add joinable multiplayer game. For the price, I feel as though it will get boring very soon as it it not a multiplayer game.
